meaning: adj.右侧的,右旋的,用右手的
examples: Most spiral-shaped snail species are predominantly dextral.
In the case of Lymnaea peregra, studies indicate that a dextral gene is expressed during egg formation.
In experiments, an injection of cytoplasm from dextral eggs changes the pattern of sinistral eggs, but an injection from sinistral eggs does not influence dextral eggs.
